Terms of Service for MyBidBook.com

Last Updated: July 19, 2026

Please read these Terms of Service ("Terms", "Terms of Service") carefully before using the MyBidBook.com website and construction bidding platform (the "Service") operated by MyBidBook ("us", "we", or "our").

By signing up for an account, accessing, or using the Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you disagree with any part of the terms, you may not access the Service.

1. Account Registration and Eligibility

To use MyBidBook.com, you must register for an account by providing accurate, current, and complete information. You are responsible for safeguarding the password that you use to access the Service and for any activities or actions under your password.

2. Limited Trial Accounts and Subscriptions

Upon signing up, users are automatically placed on a limited trial plan ("Contractor Trial") unless they immediately purchase a paid subscription plan ("Contractor Pro").

2.1 Trial Limits and Account Permissions

By registering for a Contractor Trial account, you explicitly acknowledge and agree to the following system limitations and software constraints:

  • Quote Creation Limit: Trial accounts are hard-capped at a maximum of ten (10) total quotes. If a user attempts to create or save an eleventh (11th) quote, the Service will block the save action and display the following error message:
    "Trial limit reached: You can have a maximum of 10 quotes on the Contractor Trial plan. Please upgrade to Contractor Pro to create more."
  • Quote Watermarking: Any quotes generated, viewed, exported, downloaded, or printed as a PDF by a Contractor Trial user will automatically feature a visible, diagonal watermark overlaid across the page. This watermark will explicitly read:
    "Trial Version of MyBidBook.com Please Subscribe to Remove This"

2.2 Upgrading to Contractor Pro

To lift the 10-quote maximum limit and remove the diagonal watermark from all generated documents, users must upgrade their account to a paid Contractor Pro subscription license.

3. Acceptable Use and Restrictions

You agree not to use the Service for any unlawful purpose or in any way that interrupts, damages, or impairs the functionality of MyBidBook.com. You shall not attempt to circumvent, bypass, or reverse-engineer any account limitations, including the 10-quote cap or document watermarks, established under the Contractor Trial plan.

4. User Data and Intellectual Property

You retain all rights to the customer data, project details, and pricing information you enter into the system. MyBidBook.com claims no ownership over your estimation data. However, the software layout, proprietary calculation engines, branding, and PDF generation templates remain the sole property of MyBidBook.

5. Disclaimer of Warranties

The Service is provided on an "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" basis. While we strive for absolute accuracy in our smart estimation tool, MyBidBook.com does not warrant that quote calculations, material prices, or structural bids will be entirely error-free or perfectly suited for your specific construction projects. You assume full professional responsibility for verifying the final figures before submitting quotes to your clients.

6. Limitation of Liability

In no event shall MyBidBook, its directors, or its affiliates be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including without limitation, loss of profits, data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses resulting from your use of or inability to use the Service.

7. Changes to Terms

We reserve the right, at our sole discretion, to modify or replace these Terms at any time. We will provide notice of any material changes by updating the "Last Updated" date at the top of this page.

8. Contact Us

If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact support through your account dashboard.
